_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to create different types of texts — stories, information texts and opinion texts — using our growing knowledge of text structure, grammar and vocabulary.

_source.w: We are learning to create different types of texts — stories, information texts and opinion texts — using our growing knowledge of text structure, grammar and vocabulary.
y: Being able to write different text types gives us the power to inform, entertain and persuade.
Using good structure, grammar and vocabulary makes our writing clear and effective.
Every text we create builds our skills as writers.
eg: We write a narrative with a clear orientation, complication and resolution.
We create an information text with an introduction, body paragraphs and a conclusion.
We write a persuasive text giving our opinion with at least two supporting reasons.
We use topic-specific vocabulary in our information writing.
We include descriptive language in our stories to create vivid settings and characters.
We plan our writing before we start, choosing the right structure for our purpose.
